intended_use: Athelas One is indicated for use for quantitative determination of white blood cells (WBC) and neutrophil percentages (NEUT%) in capillary or K2EDTA venous whole blood. The Athelas One system is for I
intended_use_full: Athelas One is indicated for use for quantitative determination of white blood cells (WBC) and neutrophil percentages (NEUT%) in capillary or K2EDTA venous whole blood. The Athelas One system is for In Vitro Diagnostic use only. The Athelas One is only to be used with Athelas One Test Strips. The Athelas One is indicated for use in clinical laboratories and for point of care settings. The Athelas One is only indicated for use in adult populations (aged 21 and older).
ground_truth: Sysmex XE-5000 automated hematology analyzer (predicate device)
other_metrics: WBC Precision: 7.5% CV above 2K/µL, 0.25 K/µL SD below 2K/µL; WBC Bias/Error: ±7.5% error above 2K/µL, ±0.25 K/µL error below 2K/µL; Neutrophil % Precision: 5% SD OR 15% CV; Neutrophil % Bias: ±10% bias or ±5% total error; Positive Agreement (Sensitivity) for flagging: 90.91%; Negative Agreement (Specificity) for flagging: 96.71%; Overall Flagging Agreement: 94.87%; Limit of Blank (WBC): 0 K/μL; Limit of Detection: 0.079 K/µL; Limit of Quantification: 0.44 K WBC/µL; Linearity: linear across reporting range; Specimen stability: 24 hours at room temperature and refrigerated; Test strip shelf life: 98 days
